LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS GRANTED. THE DECLARATION OF MR. CASSIDY SUFFICIENTLY ESTABLISHES PLAINTIFF'S STANDING TO MAINTAIN THIS ACTION AND A READILY ASCERTAINABLE SUM DUE. THE AMOUNT TO BE SECURED IS $97,476.01 AND PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION DEMONSTRATES THAT A BOND HAS ALREADY BEEN POSTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: SHERRY L. SAWYER, CSR NO. 5976, EMAIL: SSAWYER@SFTC.ORG. (D302)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ADDY WONG'S MOTION TO: (1) SET-ASIDE THE DEFAULT AND VACATE THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT; AND (2) QUASH AND RECALL THE WRIT OF EXECUTION AND ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT BASED ON THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. ASSUMING WITHOUT DECIDING THAT PLAINTIFF PROPERLY EFFECTUATED SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT IN ACCORDANCE WITH CCP 415.20(B) AND THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ARE NOT VOID, DEFENDANT DEMONSTRATES GOOD CAUSE FOR RELIEF PURSUANT TO CCP 473.5. DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION DEMONSTRATES THAT HE LACKED ACTUAL NOTICE OF THE SUIT IN TIME TO DEFEND IT. THERE IS A LIBERAL POLICY TO HEAR CASES ON THE MERITS. DEFENDANT SHALL IMMEDIATELY FILE THE PROPOSED ANSWER THAT WAS SUBMITTED WITH HIS MOVING PAPERS. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR FEES AND TO COMPEL DEFENDANT TO IMPOUND MONEY WITH THE COURT IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: SHERRY L. SAWYER, CSR NO. 5976, EMAIL: SSAWYER@SFTC.ORG. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Set For Trial On Mar-13-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Oct-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, David J. Cook of Cook Collection Attorneys PLC (415.989.4730) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Gener D. Benitez of Ibarra Profession Law Corporation (415.398.5329) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC's Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is GRANTED. The declaration of Mr. Cassidy sufficiently establishes plaintiff's standing to maintain this action and a readily ascertainable sum due. The amount to be secured is $97,476.01 and plaintiff's application demonstrates that a bond has already been posted. Order signed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To: (1) Set-Aside The Default And Vacate The Default Judgment; And (2) Quash And Recall The Writ Of Execution And Abstract Of Judgment Based On The Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, David J. Cook of Cook Collection Attorneys PLC (415.989.4730) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Gener D. Benitez of Ibarra Profession Law Corporation (415.398.5329) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT ADDY WONG's Motion To: (1) Set-Aside The Default And Vacate The Default Judgment; And (2) Quash And Recall The Writ Of Execution And Abstract Of Judgment Based On The Default Judgment is GRANTED. Assuming without deciding that plaintiff properly effectuated substitute service on defendant in accordance with CCP 415.20(b) and the default and default judgment are not void, defendant demonstrates good cause for relief pursuant to CCP 473.5. Defendant's declaration demonstrates that he lacked actual notice of the suit in time to defend it. There is a liberal policy to hear cases on the merits. Defendant shall immediately file the proposed answer that was submitted with his moving papers. Plaintiff's request for fees and to compel defendant to impound money with the court is denied. Order signed in open court.
Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
